nasb.text: Every place on which the sole of your foot treads shall be yours; your border will be from the wilderness to Lebanon, and from the river, the river Euphrates, as far as the western sea.

esv.text: Every place on which the sole of your foot treads shall be yours. Your territory shall be from the wilderness to the Lebanon and from the River, the river Euphrates, to the western sea.

cnv.text: 你們腳掌所踏的地，都必屬於你們；從曠野到黎巴嫩，從幼發拉底河直到西海，都要作你們的境界。

ccb.text: 你们脚掌踏过的地方都要归你们。你们的疆界南到旷野，北到黎巴嫩，东到幼发拉底河，西到地中海。
